title: Palindrome Number (Debugging)
description:
A number may remain unchanged when its digits are reversed.
The program below attempts to verify this property, but it contains errors.

title: Reverse Integer (Debugging)
description:
Digits of a number can form a new value when reversed.
The code below tries to generate that value but does not work correctly.

languages.python:
n = int(input())
rev = 0
while n > 0:
 digit = n % 10
 rev = digit * 10
 n = n // 10
print(rev)

title: Contains Duplicate (Debugging)
description:
An array may contain repeating values.
The program checks for repetition but fails due to logical errors.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock (Debugging)
description:
Stock prices change daily.
The program attempts to compute maximum possible profit but has initialization mistakes.

languages.python:
prices = list(map(int,input().split()))
min_price = 0
profit = 0
for p in prices:
 if p < min_price:
  min_price = p
 profit = max(profit, p - min_price)
print(profit)
